"DOTA_Tooltip_ability_custom_nevermore_requiem"										"Requiem of Souls"
"DOTA_Tooltip_ability_custom_nevermore_requiem_Description"							"Shadow Fiend gathers his captured souls to release them as lines of demonic energy. Units near Shadow Fiend when the souls are released can be damaged by several lines of energy. Lines of energy are created for every soul captured through Necromastery. <br><br> Requiem of Souls is automatically cast whenever Shadow Fiend dies, regardless of its cooldown."
